notes: UNVERIFIED CONFIG. Page at enkoping.se/kommun-och-politik/anslagstavla.html is the correct official anslagstavla but all content is rendered via JavaScript (SiteVision CMS). Raw HTML scraping will return empty content. Requires Playwright or similar JS-capable scraper. Attempted sub-URL /anslagstavla/kungörelser.html returned 404.
